title: Touhou Items XP Orbs [Optifine Required]
body:
![this is a preview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/510/397/2022-10-30_20.png)

This Pack replaces the XP orbs with the Power and Point Items from the Touhou Project games. It also replaces the XP collect and Level Up sounds.
Optifine is required.

![this is a preview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/510/398/2022-10-30_19.png)

**Please do not re-upload my packs anywhere else.**

**Touhou Project belongs to Team Shanghai Alice.**
